label: Greenhouse
description: Connect to Greenhouse to read candidates, jobs, applications, and recruiting pipeline data via the Harvest API.

form.title: Connect Greenhouse
form.subtitle: Paste your Harvest API key to give Anton read access to your recruiting data.

methods.label: Harvest API Key
methods.description: Paste a Harvest API key from your Greenhouse Dev Center. The simplest and most common way to integrate — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Harvest API Key

The Harvest API is Greenhouse's primary data API. API keys are scoped per user and created in the Dev Center.

### Steps

1. Log in to Greenhouse as a Site Admin.
2. Navigate to **Configure** (gear icon, top-right) → **Dev Center** → **API Credential Management**.
3. Click **Create New API Key**.
4. Set **API Type** to **Harvest**.
5. Give it a descriptive name like `Anton Integration`.
6. Click **Create**. Greenhouse displays the key **once** — copy it immediately.
7. Paste the key into the **Harvest API Key** field below.
8. Optionally set the **Subdomain** field to your Greenhouse subdomain (e.g. `yourcompany` from `yourcompany.greenhouse.io`).

### Notes

- The key is shown only once at creation. If you lose it, delete it and create a new one.
- You can restrict which endpoints the key can access under **Permissions** before saving — grant at least read access to the resources Anton needs.
- Only Site Admins can access API Credential Management. If you don't see it, ask your Greenhouse admin.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: Harvest API Key
fields.description: Found in Greenhouse → Configure → Dev Center → API Credential Management. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Greenhouse Subdomain
fields.description: The subdomain of your Greenhouse account (e.g. 'yourcompany' from yourcompany.greenhouse.io). Leave blank to use the default.

methods.label: Job Board API Key
methods.description: Use a Job Board API key for read-only access to public job listings and basic board data. More limited in scope than the Harvest API.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Job Board API Key

The Job Board API provides access to public-facing job postings and board information. It is more limited than the Harvest API.

### Steps

1. Log in to Greenhouse as a Site Admin.
2. Navigate to **Configure** → **Dev Center** → **API Credential Management**.
3. Click **Create New API Key**.
4. Set **API Type** to **Job Board**.
5. Name it (e.g. `Anton Job Board`) and click **Create**.
6. Copy the key immediately — it is shown only once.
7. Paste it into the **Job Board API Key** field below along with your board token.

### Notes

- The Job Board API only covers job postings and departments — use the Harvest API method for full recruiting pipeline access.
- Your board token appears in **Job Board** settings in Greenhouse.

fields.name: job_board_api_key
fields.label: Job Board API Key
fields.description: Found in Greenhouse → Configure → Dev Center → API Credential Management. Select 'Job Board' as the API type.

fields.name: board_token
fields.label: Job Board Token
fields.description: Your Greenhouse job board token, visible in Job Board settings. Used to identify which board to query.
